aliases: EZVIZ Battery-Powered Pan & Tilt Wi-Fi Camera HB8

power.method: Rechargeable battery (10,400mAh); DC 5V/2A adapter; solar-compatible (EZVIZ Solar Panel, optional)

storage.notes: Built-in 32GB eMMC storage; no microSD slot. Supports 10-minute daily recordings for up to 6 months.

features: 100 diagonal / 83 horizontal / 65 vertical optical lens FOV
AI human motion detection with auto-tracking
no officially confirmed RTSP/ONVIF -- official docs list only 'EZVIZ Cloud Proprietary Protocol'
